meaning: v.[鍖籡浠ユ磱鍦伴粍娌荤枟
examples: For adapting the level and scale of high college teaching, it is necessary to digitalize library in college.
VoIP( Voice over IP), i. e. IP phone, tries to digitalize voice, compress and transmit it through IP networks.
A useful attempt is made in this thesis to digitalize the production and operation of power supply enterprises.
Simply putting digital books on a device is not enough to truly digitalize education.
